item.name: Lopoceras Elegans
item.description:
Despite the sharp and dangerously pointed nature of its shell, this docile resident of the Chlorophospond is recognized as an honorary Loporrit.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: When the Loporrits came across this abnormally winding cephalopod, its beauteous spirals reminded them of a long, floppy ear. Though the lunar residents could not come to a consensus on how such an ear could be so long and floppy, they were nevertheless impressed, and would unanimously agree to name the creature an honorary Loporrit.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The Sea of Stars
